description: Audio file manifest for Activity 6 — Voice of the City
note: Run 'python data/generate_audio.py' to create these WAV files

files.description: English pothole report on Poplar Avenue
files.text: Hi, I'd like to report a large pothole on Poplar Avenue near the intersection with Highland Street. It's been there for about two weeks and it's getting worse. My car hit it yesterday and I'm worried about damage. Can someone please come fix it? My name is James and my phone number is 901-555-0147.

Hola, llamo para reportar que no han recogido la basura en mi calle desde hace una semana. Vivo en la calle Lamar Avenue en el sur de Memphis. Necesitamos que vengan a recoger la basura lo antes posible. Gracias.

files.description: English status check on existing case
files.text: Hello, I'm calling to check on the status of my service request. My case number is 311-2024-78542. I reported a broken streetlight on Beale Street about a week ago and I haven't heard back yet. Can you tell me when it will be fixed?
Xin chào, tôi muốn báo cáo một vấn đề về nước. Có nước chảy trên đường Summer Avenue gần nhà tôi. Nước đã chảy từ hai ngày trước và ngày càng tệ hơn. Xin hãy gửi người đến kiểm tra. Cảm ơn.
